---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Scaffold placeholder.** A full CV — rendered to both this HTML page and a
downloadable PDF — will be generated from `references.bib` and `talks.bib`
(plus structured sections for education, employment, awards, and grants) in Phase 5.

The Japanese (CJK) PDF pipeline this depends on is validated separately by
`cv-smoke.qmd` (Phase 1).
:::
